properties.name: All Saints' Episcopal Church
properties.Hours: Food: every Tuesday, 8:00–8:30 a.m.  Financial assistance: once every 6 months, Tuesdays 9:30–10:30 a.m.
properties.description:
All Saints’ Episcopal Church provides a taco and snacks every Tuesday. Once every six months, individuals with photo identification can receive money towards food or bills.
Learn More

properties.name: Austin Neighborhood Center
properties.description:
Clients can get assistance from this neighborhood center once a month. Before using this resource, first, check centraltexasfoodbank.org/find-food or call for help (877.541.7905)
Learn More
properties.Eligibility: Must live in Travis County and book an appointment with the contact above.
properties.Hours: Monday - Thursday 8:00 a.m. - 4:30 p.m., Friday 8:15 a.m. - 11:45 p.m.

properties.name: Blessings Box
properties.description: Texas Wesley is a church, attached to the apartment Inspire in West Campus. They have a blessings box, which is a give-and-take pantry. Anyone can donate, as well as take from this resource.

properties.name: First United Methodist Church
properties.description:
First United Methodist Church offers early morning breakfast services to support the community: Breakfast: Served every Tuesday and Thursday from 5:15 AM to 7:15 AM, providing a nourishing start to the day in a welcoming environment.
Learn More

properties.name: Foundation for the Homeless - First United Methodist Church
properties.description:
The Foundation for the Homeless provides breakfast services to individuals in need every Tuesday and Thursday from 5:30-8:00AM.
Learn More

properties.name: La Tiendita Student Pantry
properties.Address: Gordon-White Building: 210 W. 24th Street, Austin TX, 78712
properties.Contact: University Development Office c/o Latino Studies 1 University Station Mail Stop A3000 Austin, TX 78712
properties.description:
La Tiendita is a free, donation-based student pantry run by Latino Studies. It provides non-perishable food, toiletries, household products, and more to support students facing food insecurity with the help of the Central Texas Food Bank and other donors.
Learn More

properties.name: Lutheran Campus Ministry
properties.Address: 2100 San Antonio Street, Suite 120, Austin, TX.
properties.Eligibility: Must be a student at UT Austin with a UT ID
properties.description: Learn More
properties.Hours: Free Dinner: Tuesdays, 5 - 7 p.m., Food Pantry Hours: Wednesdays, 6 - 8 p.m.

properties.name: Micah 6 Food Pantry
properties.description:
Access this food pantry through the courtyard gate on the north side of the church, facing the San Antonio Street Parking Garage.
Learn More
properties.Address: University Presbyterian Church, 2200 San Antonio Street, Austin TX 78705
properties.Eligibility: Everyone, including those who do not qualify for government assistance, can come to the pantry

properties.name: Olivet Helping Hand Center
properties.description:
Clients can get assistance from this neighborhood center, part of the Central Texas Food Bank, once a month. Before using this resource, first, check centraltexasfoodbank.org/find-food or call for help (877.541.7905)
Learn More
properties.Eligibility: Must live in Travis County and book an appointment with the contact above.
properties.Hours: 2nd and 4th Saturday of the month 9:00 - 12:00 p.m.

properties.name: Our Lady of Guadalupe Church
properties.description:
Clients can get assistance from this neighborhood center, part of the Central Texas Food Bank, once a month. Before using this resource, first, check centraltexasfoodbank.org/find-food or call for help (877.541.7905)
Learn More
properties.Eligibility: Must live in Travis County and book an appointment with the contact above.
properties.Hours: 1st, 2nd, 4th, 5th Friday 10:30 a.m. – 1:00 p.m., 3rd Saturday 9:00 a.m. – 1:00 p.m

properties.name: University Baptist Church
properties.description:
University Baptist Church hosts a weekly meal service to bring the community together: God’s Family Dinner: Served every Thursday from 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM, providing a warm meal in a welcoming and inclusive environment.
Learn More

properties.Hours: Open Door Ministry Meal: Saturday 9AM – 10:30 AM
properties.name: University United Methodist Church
properties.description:
University United Methodist Church offers a weekly meal service through its Open Door Ministry.
Learn More

_umap_options.name: Food Pantries
_umap_options.description: This features a network of food pantries across the UT Austin area, which provide free groceries and essential supplies to individuals and families facing food insecurity. From non-perishable goods to fresh produce and household essentials, these resources offer critical support to students, faculty, staff, and community members.
